"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.default = _defineEnumerableProperties; function _defineEnumerableProperties(obj, descs) { for (var key in descs) { var desc = descs[key]; desc.configurable = desc.enumerable = true; if ("value" in desc) desc.writable = true; Object.defineProperty(obj, key, desc); } if (Object.getOwnPropertySymbols) { var objectSymbols = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(descs); for (var i = 0; i < objectSymbols.length; i++) { var sym = objectSymbols[i]; desc = descs[sym]; desc.configurable = desc.enumerable = true; if ("value" in desc) desc.writable = true; Object.defineProperty(obj, sym, desc); } } return obj; } //# sourceMappingURL=defineEnumerableProperties.js.map
